sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ عُمَرُ عَنْ مَعْنَى كَلِمَةٍ فِي الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Omer je tražio značenje riječi na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: Omar searched for the meaning of a word on the internet.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الْكَلِمَةَ فِي مَحْرَكِ الْبَحْثِ وَضَغَطَ بَحْثًا.
sentences.translation: Upisao je riječ u tražilicu i pritisnuo pretraži.
sentences.translationEn: He typed the word in the search engine and pressed search.

sentences.translation: Brzo je pronašao značenje i razumio ga.
sentences.translationEn: He found the meaning quickly and understood it.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: الْإِنْتِرْنِتُ يُسَاعِدُنِي كَثِيرًا فِي تَعَلُّمِ اللُّغَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Internet mi mnogo pomaže u učenju jezika.
sentences.translationEn: He said: The internet helps me a lot in learning the language.
